Community Action Team
Community Action Team
The San Bernardino County Maternal, Child and Adolescent Health (MCAH) program’s mission is to improve health outcomes of the County’s reproductive age women, infants, children, adolescents, and their families. The MCAH Community Action Team (CAT) is a partnership with you—our local providers and community stakeholders—to identify best practices, inform policy, and increase awareness through education to encourage prevention through early intervention with activities that aim to:
• Improve pregnancy outcomes, including low birth weight and prematurity rates
• Reduce the rate of Sudden Infant Death Syndrome (SIDS) and promote a safe sleep environment
• Promote health equity for the elimination of health disparities
